constraints: Update the 'Release Readiness Checklist' to check off completed items (e.g., pacman.conf fix, ISO build validation, ISO size validation, architecture limitations documentation, CHANGELOG update, dependency validation).
Update the 'Progress Tracking' section to mark 'Critical issue fixed', 'High priority items addressed', and 'Medium priority items started' as completed.
Do not introduce new tasks or modify other files.
Ensure the markdown checkbox syntax uses 'x' (i.e., `[x]`).
